overview.description: LLM-powered voicebots and chatbots for enterprise customer communication
overview.description_long: Telma AI (legal name: MAMA TELMA AI s.r.o.) builds AI voicebots and chatbots for automating customer communication across industries including finance, insurance, healthcare, and e-commerce. The platform handles inbound/outbound calls, payment reminders, and omnichannel messaging. The team are IBM Watson and IBM Research alumni with deep NLP and speech expertise. Part of the MAMA AI Group.
overview.tagline: Enhance your business growth with intelligent, industry-tailored LLM agent voicebots & chatbots

history.origin_story: Founded by alumni of IBM Watson AI R&D Lab in Prague; team spun out of IBM to commercialise conversational AI expertise independently

key_milestones.event: Company registered as MAMA TELMA AI s.r.o. in Prague (November)
CzechCrunch coverage of Mama AI chatbot platform (August)
Partnership with Czech Army for Virtual Recruitment Centre voicebot
Named newcomer of the year at Global Startup Awards
AI Awards 2024 winner (Adéla digital military recruiter voicebot)

awards: Global Startup Awards – Newcomer of the Year 2023

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core product is LLM-powered chatbots and voicebots – a space increasingly commoditised by OpenAI, Google, and Amazon (Connect). While Telma has domain expertise and a Czech-language focus, foundation models are rapidly closing the gap, and the product layer is relatively thin.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Conversational AI for enterprise is a real and growing market with clear ROI (call automation, payment reminders), but competition is fierce from hyperscalers (Google CCAI, Amazon Connect) and specialised vendors. The Czech/Central European focus provides a regional niche.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public VC funding identified; the website references government Technology Incubation support. Small team (~11-50), founded in 2021, with no disclosed revenue or funding rounds – typical high-risk startup profile.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combining high AGI displacement risk with high funding risk and medium market risk yields an overall high risk profile. Survival depends on deep enterprise integrations, language specialisation, and sector-specific compliance (e.g., ISO 27001, healthcare) that generic foundation models cannot immediately replicate.

metadata.notes: Legal entity is MAMA TELMA AI s.r.o., IČO 14022087, registered 2021-11-30 in Prague. Part of MAMA AI Group. Careers page returns 404; jobs contact is jobs@telma.ai. Technology Incubation support acknowledged on homepage footer.
